hooks.command: echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')" && echo "Recent commits:" && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- Memory Bank ---' && for f in .memory-bank/brief.md .memory-bank/context.md .memory-bank/tech.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && echo "=== $(basename $f) ===" && head -50 "$f" && echo ''; done && echo '--- End Memory Bank ---' || true

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|git push.*--force|git reset --hard|git clean -fd)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command. Ask user for confirmation.' >&2; exit 2; fi && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (add|commit)'; then SENSITIVE=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\.(env|key|pem)$|credentials|secrets' || true); if [ -n "$SENSITIVE" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Sensitive files staged: $SENSITIVE" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
